calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Juan Juan Wu mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner Sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter William Tuan.
Proof of Publication on file.
Declaration re: consent from father Wen Jian Pan on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Yuhang Pan to Hanson Yuhang Pan.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
